---
title: "India"
geometry: margin=1in
output: pdf_document
header-includes:
  - |
    ```{=latex}
    \usepackage[table]{xcolor}
    \expandafter\def\csname ver@subfig.sty\endcsname{}
    \usepackage{graphicx,subcaption}
    \makeatletter\@ifundefined{subfloat}{\newcommand{\subfloat}[2][need a sub-caption]{\subcaptionbox{#1}{#2} }}{\renewcommand{\subfloat}[2][need a sub-caption]{\subcaptionbox{#1}{#2} }}\makeatother
    ```
---


```{r setup, include=FALSE}
library('knitr')

knitr::knit_hooks$set(margins = Pmisc::hook_plot_margins)
knitr::knit_hooks$set(plot = knitr::hook_plot_tex)

knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo=FALSE, prompt=TRUE, comment=NA,
    dev='pdf', margins=1, fig.cap=' ', fig.pos='hp',
  fig.path=file.path('figure','moreBayes'),    
    fig.width=5, fig.height=5, half=NULL,
    tidy=TRUE,tidy.opts=list(indent=2, width.cutoff=45)
)

knitr::opts_hooks$set(half = function(options) {
    options$tidy.opts = list(width.cutoff = 12)#list(options$tidy.opts$width.cutoff/2)
    options
  })
options(width=80)
```


```{r ecoRegionData}
SstoreDir = c('/store/patrick/copernicus/agg', '~/Downloads/agg')
storeDir = SstoreDir[1]
if(!dir.exists(storeDir)) storeDir = SstoreDir[2]

indiaEcoRegions = terra::unwrap(readRDS(file.path(storeDir, "indiaEcoRegions.rds")))
indiaEcoRegions$name = gsub(" AND ", ", ", 
  gsub(" E.O.REGION|[(].*[)]|TO PERHUMID.*|PENINSULA ", "", indiaEcoRegions$physio_reg))
indiaEcoRegions$idName =   paste(indiaEcoRegions$objectid, indiaEcoRegions$name)

indiaEcoRegions$col = rep_len(c(
  RColorBrewer::brewer.pal(12,"Set3"),
  RColorBrewer::brewer.pal(8,"Set2")),
   length(indiaEcoRegions))


# objectid is deaths$ecoRegion

```

```{r worldPopByRegion, cache=TRUE}
year <- 2020
dir.create("data/gpw", recursive = TRUE, showWarnings = FALSE)

# geodata::population returns GPW population density (people per km^2)
pop_density <- geodata::population(year, res = 5, path = "data/gpw")

eco <- terra::project(indiaEcoRegions, terra::crs(pop_density))

pop_density_india_eco <- terra::crop(pop_density, eco)
pop_density_india_eco <- terra::mask(pop_density_india_eco, eco)

# Convert density to estimated population count per cell before extraction.
cell_area_km2 <- terra::cellSize(pop_density_india_eco, unit = "km")
pop_count <- pop_density_india_eco * cell_area_km2

eco_pop <- terra::extract(
  pop_count,
  eco,
  fun = sum,
  na.rm = TRUE,
  exact = TRUE
)

eco$gpw_2020 <- eco_pop[, 2]

eco_pop_df <- data.frame(
  objectid = eco$objectid,
  physio_reg = eco$physio_reg,
  gpw_2020 = eco$gpw_2020
)

eco_pop_df$weight = eco_pop_df$gpw_2020 / sum(eco_pop_df$gpw_2020)
```



```{r setup2, eval=FALSE}


library('data.table')
# /home/patrick/Admin/globalHealth/indiaSpatial/daily.Rmd


deaths = as.data.table(readRDS( file.path(storeDir, "indiaCC.rds")))

# trransform variables
deaths$sqrtPm = sqrt(pmin(deaths$pm,1000))
deaths$timeIid = as.numeric(deaths$date)

# table(deaths$ecoRegion, deaths$temp < -10)

deaths$tempClean = pmax(deaths$temp, -5)


deaths$dom = as.numeric(format(deaths$date, '%d'))
deaths[deaths$dom == Hmisc::monthDays(deaths$date), 'dom'] = 31
deaths[format(deaths$date, '%m%d') == '0101', 'dom'] = 0
deaths$dom = droplevels(relevel(factor(deaths$dom), '1'))
deaths$month = format(deaths$date, '%m')

save(deaths, file='deaths.RData')
```




```{r fit, eval=FALSE}
library('hpolcc')
load("deaths.RData")

# add day iid
resTemp <- hpolcc::hnlm(
  formula= medical ~ dom +  
  f(tempClean, model='hiwp',ref_value = 15, p=3, 
  knots = seq(-5, 30, by=2.5), 
  group_var = ecoRegion), 
  data = deaths[
    which(
      deaths$date > as.Date("2006/1/1")
    ), ], 
  cc_design =  c("cell","ecoRegion", "yearWeek3Dow"),
  config = list(transform_theta = TRUE, 
      dirichlet= TRUE, 
      boundary_is_random = FALSE,
      num_threads=parallel::detectCores(),
      Ngroups = 1e5,
      verbose=TRUE
  ),
  control = list(
    maxit = 1000,
    report.level = 4,
    report.freq =1 
  )
)

saveRDS(resTemp, file='resTemp.rds')

resPm <- hpolcc::hnlm(
  formula= medical ~ dom + 
    f(sqrtPm, model='hiwp', ref_value = 8, p=2, 
      knots = seq(0,32, by=2),
      group_var = ecoRegion) , 
  data=deaths[which(
      deaths$date > as.Date("2006/1/1")
    ), ], 
  config = list(transform_theta = TRUE, 
  dirichlet= TRUE, 
                boundary_is_random = FALSE,
                num_threads=parallel::detectCores()),
  control_inner=list(report.level=0),
  cc_design =  c("cell","ecoRegion", "yearWeek3Dow"),
  verbose=TRUE
  )

saveRDS(resPm, file='resPm.rds')

resPmTemp <- hpolcc::hnlm(
  formula= medical ~ dom + 
    f(sqrtPm, model='hiwp', ref_value = 8, p=2, 
      knots = seq(0,32, by=2),
      group_var = ecoRegion) +
    f(tempClean, model='hiwp',ref_value = 15, p=3, 
  knots = seq(-5, 30, by=2.5), 
  group_var = ecoRegion),
  data=deaths[which(
      deaths$date > as.Date("2006/1/1")
    ), ], 
  config = list(transform_theta = TRUE, 
  dirichlet= TRUE, 
                boundary_is_random = FALSE,
                num_threads=parallel::detectCores()),
  control_inner=list(report.level=0),
  cc_design =  c("cell","ecoRegion", "yearWeek3Dow"),
  verbose=TRUE
  )
saveRDS(resPmTemp, file='resPmTemp.rds')

# to do: create starting values from resPmTemp (remove betas from boundary)

resPmTempR <- hpolcc::hnlm(
  formula= medical ~ dom + 
    f(sqrtPm, model='hiwp', ref_value = 8, p=2, 
      knots = seq(0,32, by=2),
      group_var = ecoRegion) +
    f(tempClean, model='hiwp',ref_value = 15, p=3, 
  knots = seq(-5, 30, by=2.5), 
  group_var = ecoRegion),
  data = deaths[
    which(
      deaths$date > as.Date("2006/1/1")
    ), ], 
  cc_design =  c("cell","ecoRegion", "yearWeek3Dow"),
  config = list(transform_theta = TRUE, 
      dirichlet= TRUE, 
      boundary_is_random = TRUE,
      num_threads=parallel::detectCores(),
      verbose=FALSE
  ),
  control = list(
    maxit = 1000,
    report.level = 4,
    report.freq =1 
  )
)

saveRDS(resPmTempR, file='resPmTempR.rds')
```




```{r theResults, include=FALSE}
library('hpolcc')
res = readRDS("resPmTemp.rds")
res$parameters$theta
res$parameters$beta
str(res$sample$sim)
simGlobal = res$sample$sim
predSeq = res$sample$x$predSeq
```



```{r regionSetup}
Sgroup = setdiff(unique(res$objects$gamma_info$group), c(NA, 'GLOBAL'))
SregionName = indiaEcoRegions$physio_reg[match(Sgroup, indiaEcoRegions$objectid)]
gamma_info = res$objects$gamma_info
popWeighted = as.list(rep(0, length(unique((gamma_info$var)))))
names(popWeighted) = unique((gamma_info$var))
```


```{r byRegionTemplate, eval=FALSE, include=FALSE}
xHere = res$sample$x$predSeq[[Dvar]]

if(grepl("sqrt", Dvar)) xHere = xHere^2

Ahere = res$sample$XA[[Dvar]]$A
simGlobalHere = res$sample$sim[[Dvar]]

simGlobalHereY = 100*(exp(simGlobalHere)-1)
simGlobalHereYq = t(apply(simGlobalHereY, 1, quantile, probs=c(0.025, 0.975, 0.5)))

yLimHere = range(simGlobalHereY)
xLimHere = range(xHere)

for(Dgroup in Sgroup) {
gammaHere = gamma_info[
  which(gamma_info$var == Dvar & gamma_info$group == Dgroup), ]
AhereNewNames = gsub('_GLOBAL_', paste0('_', Dgroup, '_'), colnames(Ahere))
AhereNewNames = gsub('_fpoly_', paste0('_hrpoly_', Dgroup, '_'), AhereNewNames)
if(!all(AhereNewNames %in% gammaHere$name)) {
  warning("missing stuff")
  print(setdiff(AhereNewNames, gammaHere$name))
}
gammaSimHere = res$sample$gamma[gammaHere$gamma_id, ]
Ahere = Ahere[,match(gammaHere$name, AhereNewNames)]
simHereR = Ahere %*% gammaSimHere
simHere = simHereR + simGlobalHere
simHere = 100*(exp(simHere)-1)

popWeighted[[Dvar]] = popWeighted[[Dvar]] + 
  eco_pop_df[which(eco_pop_df$objectid == Dgroup), 'weight'] * simHere

theYq = t(apply(simHere, 1, quantile, probs=c(0.025, 0.975, 0.5)))

  matplot(xHere, simHere, type='l',
    xlab = Dvar, ylab='100 x (RR-1)',
    col='#00000010', lty=1, xaxs='i',
    ylim = yLimHere, xlim = xLimHere)
   matlines(xHere, simGlobalHereYq, lty=c(2,2,1), lwd=c(1,1,3), col='red')
  matlines(xHere, theYq, lty=c(2,2,1), lwd=c(1,1,2), col='green') 
}
```

```{r byRegionSetup1}
Dvar = grep("temp", unique(gamma_info$var), value=TRUE)
```

```{r byRegion1, fig.cap=gsub("sqrt", "", Dvar), fig.subcap = Sgroup, fig.height=4, fig.width=4, ref.label = 'byRegionTemplate', eval=(length(Dvar)>0), out.width='0.23\\linewidth', fig.align='center'}
```

```{r byRegionSetup2}
Dvar = grep("[pP]m$", unique(gamma_info$var), value=TRUE)
```

```{r byRegion2, fig.cap=gsub("sqrt","",Dvar), fig.subcap = Sgroup, fig.height=4, fig.width=4, ref.label = 'byRegionTemplate', eval=(length(Dvar)>0), out.width='0.23\\linewidth', fig.align='center'}
```


```{r globalSetup}
Svar = names(res$sample$sim)
SvarNames = c(tempClean = 'temperature', sqrtPm = 'PM2.5')[Svar]
theXlim = list(
  tempClean = c(4, 38),
  sqrtPm = c(0, 450)
  )
forGlobal = expand.grid(var = Svar, type = c('Common', 'Pop Avg'), stringsAsFactors=FALSE)
forGlobal$varName = SvarNames[forGlobal$var]
forGlobal$subcap = paste(forGlobal$varName, forGlobal$type)

forYlim = lapply(popWeighted, function(xx) apply(xx, 1, quantile, c(0.03, 0.97)))  

for(D in names(forYlim)) {
  xHere = res$sample$x$predSeq[[D]]
  if(grepl("sqrt", D)) xHere = xHere^2
  
  forYlim[[D]] = forYlim[[D]][, 
    xHere <= max(theXlim[[D]]) &
    xHere >= min(theXlim[[D]])
    ]
}
theYlim = lapply(forYlim, function(xx) range(c(-2, xx)))

```


```{r globalRes, fig.cap='Common component', fig.subcap = forGlobal$subcap, out.width='0.48\\linewidth', fig.height=5, fig.width=5}
par(mar=c(3,3,0,0), bty='l')

for(D in 1:nrow(forGlobal)) {
  Dvar = forGlobal[D, 'var']

if(forGlobal[D,'type'] == 'Common') {
  avgHere = 100*(exp(res$sample$sim[[Dvar]])-1)
} else {
  avgHere = popWeighted[[Dvar]]
}


xHere = res$sample$x$predSeq[[Dvar]]
if(grepl("sqrt", Dvar)) xHere = xHere^2

theYq = t(apply(avgHere, 1, quantile, probs=c(0.025, 0.975, 0.5)))

yLimHere = theYlim[[Dvar]]
xLimHere = theXlim[[Dvar]]


  matplot(xHere, avgHere, type='l',
    xlab = SvarNames[Dvar], ylab='100 x (RR-1)',
  col='#00000010', lty=1, xaxs='i', yaxs='i',
  ylim = yLimHere, xlim = xLimHere)

matlines(xHere, theYq, lty=c(2,2,1), lwd=c(1,1,2), col='red')

}


```




```{r ecoRegionmap, fig.cap = 'Eco regions', fig.subcap = c('reginos','legend') ,fig.height=5, fig.width=5, out.width = '0.48\\linewidth'}


mapmisc::map.new(indiaEcoRegions)
terra::plot(indiaEcoRegions, add=TRUE, col=indiaEcoRegions$col)
terra::text(terra::centroids(indiaEcoRegions), indiaEcoRegions$objectid)
#terra::plot(indiaEcoRegions[4,], add=TRUE, col='yellow')

mapmisc::map.new(indiaEcoRegions)
mapmisc::legendBreaks(
  'left', 
  col=rev(indiaEcoRegions$col), 
  legend = rev(indiaEcoRegions$idName),
  cex = 0.7, bty='n', width = Inf)
```


```{r ecoTable, results='asis', include=FALSE}
knitr::kable(mapmisc::legendTable(data.frame(
  label = indiaEcoRegions$idName,
  col=indiaEcoRegions$col
  ), type='latex'), format='latex', escape=FALSE,
  align = c("c", "l"),
  col.names = c("", "Eco region"),
  caption = "Eco-regions used in the analysis"
) |>
  kableExtra::kable_styling(
    latex_options = c("hold_position", "striped"),
    full_width = FALSE,
    font_size = 9
  ) |>
  kableExtra::column_spec(1, latex_column_spec = "p{0.05\\\\linewidth}") |>
  kableExtra::column_spec(2, latex_column_spec = "p{0.7\\\\linewidth}")
```
